message_list_observation: Observe only the visible conversation list.
Use visible name, row position, and latest preview hash for candidate_key.
thread_observation: Open the target thread and mark turn_boundary_evidence explicitly.
Do not treat old visible app/profile content as a new inbound reply.
stage_send_verification: Verify exact staged text before any send.
post_send_verification: Record succeeded only when a fresh outbound bubble is visible.
known_gui_pitfalls: Profile screenshots may be separate from the live chat; keep profile analysis and chat observations distinct.
